canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>breath</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; background: #0a0a0f; }
canvas { display: block; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; }
#bg { z-index: 1; }
#fog { z-index: 2; }
#draw { z-index: 3; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="bg"></canvas>
<canvas id="fog"></canvas>
<canvas id="draw"></canvas>
<script>
const bgCanvas = document.getElementById('bg');
const fogCanvas = document.getElementById('fog');
const drawCanvas = document.getElementById('draw');
const bgCtx = bgCanvas.getContext('2d');
const fogCtx = fogCanvas.getContext('2d');
const drawCtx = drawCanvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
let mouse = { x: -1000, y: -1000 };
let isDrawing = false;
let lastMouse = { x: 0, y: 0 };

// Fog density grid
let fogGrid = [];
let gridW, gridH;
const CELL = 4;

// City lights (bokeh effect)
let lights = [];

// Audio
let audioCtx, breathGain, noiseNode, noiseGain;
let breathPhase = 0;
let isBreathing = false;

function resize() {
    W = window.innerWidth;
    H = window.innerHeight;
    bgCanvas.width = fogCanvas.width = drawCanvas.width = W;
    bgCanvas.height = fogCanvas.height = drawCanvas.height = H;
    
    gridW = Math.ceil(W / CELL);
    gridH = Math.ceil(H / CELL);
    
    // Preserve existing fog or initialize
    const oldGrid = fogGrid;
    fogGrid = new Float32Array(gridW * gridH);
    
    // Start with light ambient fog
    for (let i = 0; i < fogGrid.length; i++) {
        fogGrid[i] = 0.15 + Math.random() * 0.1;
    }
    
    // Generate city lights
    lights = [];
    const numLights = Math.floor((W * H) / 8000);
    for (let i = 0; i < numLights; i++) {
        lights.push({
            x: Math.random() * W,
            y: H * 0.3 + Math.random() * H * 0.6,
            r: 10 + Math.random() * 30,
            hue: Math.random() < 0.6 ? (180 + Math.random() * 40) : (300 + Math.random() * 60), // cyan or pink
            brightness: 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.7,
            flicker: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
            flickerSpeed: 0.02 + Math.random() * 0.03
        });
    }
}

function initAudio() {
    if (audioCtx) return;
    audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
    
    // Create brown noise for breath sound
    const bufferSize = audioCtx.sampleRate * 2;
    const buffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, audioCtx.sampleRate);
    const data = buffer.getChannelData(0);
    
    let lastOut = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) {
        const white = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
        data[i] = (lastOut + (0.02 * white)) / 1.02;
        lastOut = data[i];
        data[i] *= 3.5;
    }
    
    noiseNode = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
    noiseNode.buffer = buffer;
    noiseNode.loop = true;
    
    // Filter for breath character
    const filter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
    filter.type = 'bandpass';
    filter.frequency.value = 400;
    filter.Q.value = 0.5;
    
    noiseGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    noiseGain.gain.value = 0;
    
    // Master gain
    breathGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    breathGain.gain.value = 0.15;
    
    noiseNode.connect(filter);
    filter.connect(noiseGain);
    noiseGain.connect(breathGain);
    breathGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
    
    noiseNode.start();
}

function drawBackground() {
    // Dark gradient background
    const grad = bgCtx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, H);
    grad.addColorStop(0, '#0a0812');
    grad.addColorStop(0.5, '#0f0a18');
    grad.addColorStop(1, '#0a0510');
    bgCtx.fillStyle = grad;
    bgCtx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    
    // Draw blurred city lights (bokeh)
    lights.forEach(light => {
        light.flicker += light.flickerSpeed;
        const flick = 0.7 + 0.3 * Math.sin(light.flicker);
        const alpha = light.brightness * flick * 0.4;
        
        const grad = bgCtx.createRadialGradient(
            light.x, light.y, 0,
            light.x, light.y, light.r
        );
        grad.addColorStop(0, `hsla(${light.hue}, 80%, 70%, ${alpha})`);
        grad.addColorStop(0.3, `hsla(${light.hue}, 70%, 50%, ${alpha * 0.5})`);
        grad.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
        
        bgCtx.fillStyle = grad;
        bgCtx.fillRect(light.x - light.r, light.y - light.r, light.r * 2, light.r * 2);
    });
}

function updateFog() {
    const evapRate = 0.0008;
    const spreadRate = 0.02;
    
    // Calculate breath intensity based on mouse movement
    const dx = mouse.x - lastMouse.x;
    const dy = mouse.y - lastMouse.y;
    const movement = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    isBreathing = movement > 0.5 || isDrawing;
    
    // Breath adds condensation
    if (mouse.x > 0 && mouse.y > 0 && !isDrawing) {
        const breathRadius = 60;
        const cx = Math.floor(mouse.x / CELL);
        const cy = Math.floor(mouse.y / CELL);
        const r = Math.ceil(breathRadius / CELL);
        
        for (let dy = -r; dy <= r; dy++) {
            for (let dx = -r; dx <= r; dx++) {
                const gx = cx + dx;
                const gy = cy + dy;
                if (gx < 0 || gx >= gridW || gy < 0 || gy >= gridH) continue;
                
                const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) * CELL;
                if (dist < breathRadius) {
                    const idx = gy * gridW + gx;
                    const intensity = 1 - (dist / breathRadius);
                    // Breathing rhythm
                    breathPhase += 0.002;
                    const breathMod = 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(breathPhase * 5);
                    fogGrid[idx] = Math.min(1, fogGrid[idx] + intensity * 0.08 * breathMod);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Drawing clears fog (finger wiping condensation)
    if (isDrawing && mouse.x > 0) {
        const wipeRadius = 25;
        const cx = Math.floor(mouse.x / CELL);
        const cy = Math.floor(mouse.y / CELL);
        const r = Math.ceil(wipeRadius / CELL);
        
        for (let dy = -r; dy <= r; dy++) {
            for (let dx = -r; dx <= r; dx++) {
                const gx = cx + dx;
                const gy = cy + dy;
                if (gx < 0 || gx >= gridW || gy < 0 || gy >= gridH) continue;
                
                const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) * CELL;
                if (dist < wipeRadius) {
                    const idx = gy * gridW + gx;
                    const intensity = 1 - (dist / wipeRadius);
                    fogGrid[idx] = Math.max(0, fogGrid[idx] - intensity * 0.5);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Evaporation and slight spread
    const newGrid = new Float32Array(fogGrid.length);
    for (let y = 0; y < gridH; y++) {
        for (let x = 0; x < gridW; x++) {
            const idx = y * gridW + x;
            let val = fogGrid[idx];
            
            // Neighbor averaging (condensation spreads slightly)
            let sum = val * 4;
            let count = 4;
            if (x > 0) { sum += fogGrid[idx - 1]; count++; }
            if (x < gridW - 1) { sum += fogGrid[idx + 1]; count++; }
            if (y > 0) { sum += fogGrid[idx - gridW]; count++; }
            if (y < gridH - 1) { sum += fogGrid[idx + gridW]; count++; }
            
            val = val * (1 - spreadRate) + (sum / count) * spreadRate;
            
            // Evaporation (cleared areas evaporate faster)
            val -= evapRate * (val < 0.1 ? 3 : 1);
            
            // Slow re-condensation to ambient level
            if (val < 0.15) val += 0.0002;
            
            newGrid[idx] = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, val));
        }
    }
    fogGrid = newGrid;
    
    lastMouse.x = mouse.x;
    lastMouse.y = mouse.y;
}

function drawFog() {
    fogCtx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
    
    // Create image data for fog
    const imageData = fogCtx.createImageData(W, H);
    const data = imageData.data;
    
    for (let y = 0; y < H; y++) {
        const gy = Math.floor(y / CELL);
        for (let x = 0; x < W; x++) {
            const gx = Math.floor(x / CELL);
            const idx = gy * gridW + gx;
            const fog = fogGrid[idx] || 0;
            
            // Bilinear interpolation for smoother look
            const px = (x % CELL) / CELL;
            const py = (y % CELL) / CELL;
            
            let f00 = fog;
            let f10 = gx < gridW - 1 ? fogGrid[idx + 1] : fog;
            let f01 = gy < gridH - 1 ? fogGrid[idx + gridW] : fog;
            let f11 = (gx < gridW - 1 && gy < gridH - 1) ? fogGrid[idx + gridW + 1] : fog;
            
            const smoothFog = f00 * (1 - px) * (1 - py) + f10 * px * (1 - py) + 
                             f01 * (1 - px) * py + f11 * px * py;
            
            const pIdx = (y * W + x) * 4;
            
            // Fog color: slightly blue-gray tint
            const alpha = smoothFog * 0.85;
            data[pIdx] = 200;     // R
            data[pIdx + 1] = 210; // G  
            data[pIdx + 2] = 220; // B
            data[pIdx + 3] = alpha * 255;
        }
    }
    
    fogCtx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
    
    // Add subtle texture/noise overlay
    fogCtx.globalAlpha = 0.03;
    for (let i = 0; i < 1000; i++) {
        const x = Math.random() * W;
        const y = Math.random() * H;
        const gy = Math.floor(y / CELL);
        const gx = Math.floor(x / CELL);
        const idx = gy * gridW + gx;
        if (fogGrid[idx] > 0.3) {
            fogCtx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,255,255,${Math.random() * 0.5})`;
            fogCtx.fillRect(x, y, 1, 1);
        }
    }
    fogCtx.globalAlpha = 1;
}

function updateAudio() {
    if (!audioCtx) return;
    
    const targetGain = isBreathing ? 0.4 : 0.05;
    noiseGain.gain.value += (targetGain - noiseGain.gain.value) * 0.1;
}

function animate() {
    updateFog();
    drawBackground();
    drawFog();
    updateAudio();
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// Event listeners
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

drawCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    mouse.x = e.clientX;
    mouse.y = e.clientY;
});

drawCanvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
    isDrawing = true;
    initAudio();
});

drawCanvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
    isDrawing = false;
});

drawCanvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    mouse.x = -1000;
    mouse.y = -1000;
    isDrawing = false;
});

drawCanvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    isDrawing = true;
    const touch = e.touches[0];
    mouse.x = touch.clientX;
    mouse.y = touch.clientY;
    initAudio();
});

drawCanvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const touch = e.touches[0];
    mouse.x = touch.clientX;
    mouse.y = touch.clientY;
});

drawCanvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
    isDrawing = false;
    mouse.x = -1000;
    mouse.y = -1000;
});

// Double-click to clear all fog (fresh glass)
drawCanvas.addEventListener('dblclick', () => {
    for (let i = 0; i < fogGrid.length; i++) {
        fogGrid[i] = 0;
    }
});

// Initialize
resize();
animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
